PERCYJACKSON-NO_SWEAT_POWER.title: No Sweat
PERCYJACKSON-RAISING_THE_TIBER_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, raise the maximum [gold]Tide[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-RAISING_THE_TIBER_POWER.sma: At the start of your turn, raise the maximum [gold]Tide[/gold] by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
PERCYJACKSON-NO_TIDE_GAIN_POWER.descript: You may not raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] this turn.
PERCYJACKSON-NO_TIDE_GAIN_POWER.smartDes: You may not raise the [gold]Tide[/gold] this turn.
PERCYJACKSON-NO_TIDE_GAIN_POWER.title: No Tide
PERCYJACKSON-WATER_WALKING_POWER.descrip: Whenever you play a card this turn, gain [gold]Tide[/gold].

PERCYJACKSON-WATER_WALKING_POWER.title: Walking on Water
PERCYJACKSON-BUBBLE_POWER.description: Whenever you overflow the [gold]Tide[/gold], gain extra [gold]Block[/gold].

PERCYJACKSON-BUBBLE_POWER.title: Bubbled
PERCYJACKSON-UNWAVERING_POWER.descriptio: The first few times you consume [gold]Vigor[/gold] each turn, reapply the lost [gold]Vigor[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-UNWAVERING_POWER.smartDescr: The first [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time{Amount:plural:|s} you consume [gold]Vigor[/gold] each turn, reapply the lost [gold]Vigor[/gold].
PERCYJACKSON-UNWAVERING_POWER.title: Unwavering
PERCYJACKSON-GREEK_STYLE_IMPROV_POWER.de: For the next few turns, all cards are [gold]Combo[/gold] cards and ignore [gold]Combo[/gold] count restrictions.

PERCYJACKSON-ACHILLES_HEEL_POWER.descrip:
Gain [gold]Energy[/gold] and clear all stackable debuff at the start of your turn.
You take double attack damage.

Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} and clear all stackable debuff at the start of your turn.
You take double attack damage.
PERCYJACKSON-ACHILLES_HEEL_POWER.title: Achilles' Heel
PERCYJACKSON-TORMENTED_POWER.description: Tormented creatures take damage proportional to the sum of their debuffs at the start of their turn.
PERCYJACKSON-TORMENTED_POWER.smartDescri: Takes damage equal to {Amount:plural:{Amount:diff()} x |}the sum of their debuffs at the start of their turn.
PERCYJACKSON-TORMENTED_POWER.title: Tormented
PERCYJACKSON-GUILTY_POWER.description: Shuffle a copy of [gold]Guilty[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] whenever a creature that you are tormenting suffers from their torment.

PERCYJACKSON-GUILTY_POWER.title: Guilty
PERCYJACKSON-WOUNDED_POWER.description: Wounded creatures lose HP when taking unblocked attack damage. Each turn, Wounded is reduced by 1.

PERCYJACKSON-WOUNDED_POWER.title: Wounded
